tracks.title: Static
tracks.loreNote: The opening statement of the 'Freedom Era.' The line 'I am the static! I am the noise!' became the definitive rallying cry for the Ironheads.

tracks.title: Garbage
tracks.loreNote: Ryan's raw, unfiltered rage track immortalizing the 'dirty mirror' incident from the 1992 Friction photo shoot. A blistering middle finger to the industry.

tracks.title: Not Your Saint
tracks.loreNote: Cassidy's fierce arena-rock rejection of the media's 'Victim-Saint' narrative following the 1994 trial. A declaration of independence.

tracks.title: Atmosphere (Warehouse Demo)
tracks.loreNote: The 'Lost Gem' from the canceled 1992 Friction sessions. Julian Vance's misinterpretation of these literal space-shuttle lyrics caused the catastrophic contract fallout.

tracks.title: The Fortress
tracks.loreNote: Dedicated to the fans who crowdfunded their legal defense and studio rent. 'The Fortress' represents both the warehouse and the impenetrable wall the fans built.

tracks.title: Escape Velocity (Ad Astra)
tracks.loreNote: The 15-minute Magnum Opus that consumed all of Side B. Cassidy's autobiographical progressive rock suite charting her escape from the trial to artistic freedom.
